'''Antha-Kres''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tiss'shar]] of considerable influence residing on [[Tiss'sharl]], where he served as the [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]]. An eligible candidate for the position of [[President of the Tiss'sharl League|President]] of the [[Tiss'sharl League]], he was assassinated by order of the ambitious [[Geor-Dan-Thi]] who sought to remove his opponents for the Presidency.

{{Char-stub}}
